backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining user profiles, messages, mood categories, templates, and access control with initialization for counseling-related data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs with high-confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of multiple frontend components including layout, sections, primitives, and visual elements for documentation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining light and dark theme CSS variables plus global background, text, and border styles.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML document setting metadata, social tags, structured data, and loading the React app entrypoint.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the landing page with ErrorBoundary, Suspense, auth provider, and global toaster.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthCrypto.ts: Implements PBKDF2‑based password verifier generation, verification, and AES‑GCM key derivation for local authentication.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthStore.ts: IndexedDB-backed store for saving accounts and session records with CRUD operations for local authentication.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalAuthSc: Login/signup UI with username, password, CAPTCHA, and error handling using local auth hooks.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalCaptch: Simple math CAPTCHA component that regenerates challenges and reports verification status.
frontend/src/components/experience/Anony: Encrypted anonymous chat that decrypts message history, classifies mood, sends encrypted replies, and may show therapist prompts.
frontend/src/components/experience/DataE: Form for submitting key/value entries, classifying mood, showing insights, and optionally previewing mood preset templates.
frontend/src/components/experience/Exper: Entry screen offering Internet Identity or local login, with transitions and loading states.
Layout wrapper applying a card-style container with animated transitions.
Top-level authenticated experience UI with tabs, chat, data entry, therapist inbox, and logout handling.
frontend/src/components/experience/MoodI: Displays a mood insight alert with an icon, gradient title, and reassurance message styled by mood category.
frontend/src/components/experience/MoodP: Shows a mood preset alert containing a category label, reassurance text, and insight section with category-specific styling.
frontend/src/components/experience/Sessi: Form for submitting a therapy session request with category info and a user‑typed message, including validation and loading states.
frontend/src/components/experience/Thera: Lists all therapy session requests with metadata like category, timestamp, and user ID, handling loading and empty states.
Modal prompting users to connect with a therapist, optionally showing a session request form after proceeding.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer showing copyright info and a link to caffeine.ai with dynamic hostname tagging.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomInVie: Wraps content with an in‑view zoom‑in animation, respecting reduced‑motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomPageT: Handles animated zoom transitions between landing and experience views with timing control and reduced‑motion fallback.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomTrans: Animates children with a zoom‑in effect after an optional delay, with reduced‑motion support.
frontend/src/components/navigation/GoBac: Reusable back button that triggers a custom handler or browser history navigation.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Butto: Configurable button component with variants, sizes, and animated transitions.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Callo: Stylized callout box displaying highlighted text with a quote icon.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Conve: Shows a simple animated preview of a user–AI message exchange.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Glass: Glass‑style card wrapper with hover and focus transitions.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Progr: Step progress bar that visually represents current and total steps with animation.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Secti: Generic section wrapper supporting eyebrow text, title, description, and layout spacing.
frontend/src/components/sections/CoreEmo: Animated section presenting a core emotional question and short supporting text.
frontend/src/components/sections/Corpora: Scroll‑revealed section explaining burnout with paragraphs and a callout statistic.
frontend/src/components/sections/FAQSect: FAQ section rendering questions and answers inside animated accordion items.
frontend/src/components/sections/Feature: Grid of feature cards with icons and staggered animations on scroll.
frontend/src/components/sections/FinalCT: Final call‑to‑action section with glowing background and primary action buttons.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section with animated background, particle overlay, headline text, and primary CTAs.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Displays a three‑step animated walkthrough with hover-activated conversation previews. Uses in‑view detection and reduced‑motion preferences to control transitions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Privacy: Renders a privacy-focused section listing trust points with icons and a badge image. Animates into view using intersection observer logic.
frontend/src/components/system/AccessDen: Shows an access-denied message with an alert icon and optional back button. Intended for restricted therapist/admin areas.
frontend/src/components/system/ErrorBoun: Implements a React error boundary with enhanced logging, retry button, and expandable technical details. Captures errors and reloads the page for recovery.
frontend/src/components/visual/NeuralPar: Generates an animated neural-particle canvas background unless reduced motion is preferred. Handles particle movement, connections, resizing, and cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperienceNavigati: Manages open/close state of an experience view synced with browser history, safely handling invalid states and back/forward navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, loading stored identities, and handling login state via Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalAuth.tsx: Implements a local authentication provider supporting signup, signin, session persistence, password verification, and encryption key management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating messages, encrypted messages, data entries, mood templates, and session requests using a backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures global styles, theme variables, typography, and Tailwind layers for light and dark UI design.
frontend/src/lib/classifier/moodBurnoutR: Classifies text or ratings into mood categories and burnout risk using keyword heuristics and structured rules.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Provides AES-GCM encryption/decryption utilities and helpers for serializing and parsing encrypted message objects.
frontend/src/lib/moodInsight.ts: Selects reassurance and insight templates for mood categories, falling back to defaults and generating display-ready mood insights.
frontend/src/lib/moodPresets.ts: Provides fallback reassurance and insight templates by mood category and helpers to pick random templates.
frontend/src/lib/motion.ts: Defines animation timing constants and helpers for transitions and zoom effects.
frontend/src/lib/security/passwordPolicy: Implements password complexity validation, rotation checks, and requirement text utilities.
frontend/src/lib/useInView.ts: React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when an element enters view, respecting reduced‑motion settings.
frontend/src/lib/usePrefersReducedMotion: Hook that tracks the user's prefers‑reduced‑motion media setting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React root and wraps the app with query and identity providers.
Renders the landing page with animated sections and conditionally shows the experience view.
frontend/src/utils/errorBoundaryDiagnost: Captures navigation context for debugging errors and logs details for ErrorBoundary crashes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash‑based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, animations, and container settings with plugins.
project_state.json: Describes project metadata and issues, mainly an immediate app-load crash triggering an ErrorBoundary. Lists three existing features focused on crash fixes, history-state hardening, and improved diagnostics.
